hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | grep -qE '\.py$' && mkdir -p "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude" && touch "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/.pyfltr-dirty"; exit 0

MARKER="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/.pyfltr-dirty"; [ -f "$MARKER" ] && { (cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && uv run pyfltr --exit-zero-even-if-formatted --commands=fast pytools scripts tests) >&2; rm -f "$MARKER"; }; exit 0
